user.title: OpenAI Assist
user.description: Configure ChatGPT/Codex OAuth using the Codex CLI auth.json file that Home Assistant can read.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate OpenAI Assist
reauth_confirm.description: OpenAI rejected the stored ChatGPT/Codex credentials. Point Home Assistant at a fresh Codex auth.json file.

error.api_error: OpenAI returned an error during validation.
error.codex_auth_file_unreadable: Home Assistant could not read the Codex auth.json file at that path.
error.invalid_codex_auth_json: Codex auth.json is not valid or is missing ChatGPT OAuth tokens.
